message: Hi! My valuation is low, so I can only afford to bid up to 40. If your cost is below that, please keep your ask at 40 or lower so we can trade every round.
My cost is above 40, so trading at that price would give me a loss. I won't be able to accept any bid at or below 40. We may not find a mutually beneficial price this game.
I saw your ask of 65. That is higher than I'd like, but I can stretch to 55. Let's meet there. I will bid 55 this round. Please ask 55 so we can both make some profit.
My cost is 61. Asking 55 means losing 6. I'll ask 63 this round. Can you stretch higher to make this work? We both need profit.
Thanks for meeting at 63. Since my valuation is 64, I only made 1 last round. I literally cannot go higher. Let's keep trading at 63 every round so we both get something. I will bid 63.
Confirmed. I'll ask 63 this round. Let's both keep profiting together at this price.
